extends JFrame

    • Method Detail

      • getVisibleTermLabels

        public TermLabelVisibilityManager getVisibleTermLabels()

      • getInstance

        public static MainWindow getInstance()

      • getInstance

        public static MainWindow getInstance(boolean ensureIsVisible)

      • hasInstance

        public static boolean hasInstance()

        Checks if an instance of the main window is already created or not.

        This method is required, because the Eclipse integration of KeY has to do some cleanup only if a MainWindow instance exists.

        Returns:
        true MainWindow exists and is available via getInstance(), false MainWindow is not instantiated and will be instantiated via getInstance().

      • applyGnomeWorkaround

        private void applyGnomeWorkaround()
        Workaround to an issue with the Gnome window manager. This sets the application title in the app menu (in the top bar) to "KeY" instead of the full class name ("de-uka-ilkd...."). This should not have a negative effect on other window managers. See here for details.

      • setLaF

        private void setLaF()
        Tries to set the system look and feel if this option is activated.

      • getUnicodeToggleAction

      • getHidePackagePrefixToggleAction

        public Action getHidePackagePrefixToggleAction()

      • savePreferences

        public void savePreferences(Component component)
        Store the properties of the named components under component to the system preferences. This uses the Preferences class to access the system preferences. Preferences are not explicitly synchronised; this happens at application end using syncPreferences(). All components which are in the component tree are queried.
        Parameters:
        component - the non-null component whose preferences are to be saved
        See Also:
        PreferenceSaver

      • loadPreferences

        public final void loadPreferences(Component component)
        Load the properties of the named components under component from the system preferences. This uses the Preferences class to access the system preferences. All components which are in the component tree are queried.
        Parameters:
        component - the non-null component whose preferences are to be set
        See Also:
        PreferenceSaver

      • syncPreferences

        public final void syncPreferences()
        Synchronised the system properties with the background storage system. This is typically called at application termination.
        See Also:
        PreferenceSaver

      • getExitMainAction

        public ExitMainAction getExitMainAction()

        Returns the ExitMainAction that is used to exit the MainWindow.

        This functionality is required because for instance other projects like the Eclipse integration has to close the main window.

        Returns:
        The used ExitMainAction.

      • getNotificationManager

        public NotificationManager getNotificationManager()

        Returns the NotificationManager.

        This functionality is required because in other project is it required to execute the automatic mode without opening the result dialog which can be disabled in the NotificationManager.

        Returns:

      • addRecentFile

        protected void addRecentFile(String absolutePath)

      • openExamples

        public void openExamples()

               List<File> classPath,
               File bootClassPath,
               List<File> includes)

        public List<Name> getSortedTermLabelNames()

      • getControlToolBar

        public JToolBar getControlToolBar()
        Returns the JToolBar with the proof control.

        This method is used by the Eclipse world to add additional features!

        Returns:
        The JToolBar with the proof control.

      • setShowTacletInfo

        public void setShowTacletInfo(boolean show)
        Defines if talcet infos are shown or not.

        Used by the Eclipse integration.

        Parameters:
        show - true show taclet infos, false hide taclet infos.
